title: QV Skin Lotion | 24-Hours Skin Hydrating | Suitable for Normal, Dry & Sensitive Skin
detail_text: Product Description: QV Skin Lotion is scientifically formulated with a blend of moisturising ingredients to help relieve and prevent dry skin. With a luxuriously light formulation, this fragrance-free QV Skin Lotion hydrates skin for up to 24hrs. For best results, apply after shower. Benefits: Helps seal in natural moisture for by acting as a protective barrier. pH balanced, low-irritant formulation, free from fragrance, colour, Lanolin and Propylene Glycol. Suitable for sensitive skin and flaking or itchiness due to dry skin conditions. Also suitable for use with eczema-prone skin. Suitable for infants and the elderly. Non-comedogenic, so it won’t block pores. Hypoallergenic & Dermatologically tested. Vegan Friendly - contains no animal derived ingredients. Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Petrolatum, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Steareth-2, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine. Directions: Apply lotion to affected areas as often as required, particularly after showering, bathing, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night. Tips: Remember to moisturise after your bath or shower to help lock in moisture. Cautions: For external use only. Avoid eyes. If lotion enters the eyes, rinse with clean water immediately. Storage: Store below 30°C Shelf Life: 3 years from manufacturing date Country of Origin: Australia
detail_html:
Product Description:

QV Skin Lotion is scientifically formulated with a blend of moisturising ingredients to help relieve and prevent dry skin. With a luxuriously light formulation, this fragrance-free QV Skin Lotion hydrates skin for up to 24hrs. For best results, apply after shower.

Benefits:

  • Helps seal in natural moisture for by acting as a protective barrier.
  • pH balanced, low-irritant formulation, free from fragrance, colour, Lanolin and Propylene Glycol.
  • Suitable for sensitive skin and flaking or itchiness due to dry skin conditions. Also suitable for use with eczema-prone skin.
  • Suitable for infants and the elderly.
  • Non-comedogenic, so it won’t block pores.
  • Hypoallergenic & Dermatologically tested.
  • Vegan Friendly - contains no animal derived ingredients.

Ingredients:

Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Petrolatum, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Steareth-2, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine.

Directions:

Apply lotion to affected areas as often as required, particularly after showering, bathing, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night.

Tips:

Remember to moisturise after your bath or shower to help lock in moisture.

Cautions:

For external use only. Avoid eyes. If lotion enters the eyes, rinse with clean water immediately.

Storage: Store below 30°C

Shelf Life: 3 years from manufacturing date

Country of Origin: Australia

title: MALIN+GOETZ Vitamin B5 Body Moisturizer(220ml)
detail_text: MALIN+GOETZ Vitamin B5 Body Moisturizer(220ml) A daily nourishing body lotion with a lightweight formula designed to provide skin with balanced hydration, suitable for regular care, absorbs quickly, and helps the skin maintain all-day hydration and comfort. Product Features: •Deep moisturizing without greasiness, multiple moisturizing and nourishing ingredients work together to provide the skin with continuous hydration experience. •Lightweight lotion texture, quickly absorbed after application, without any noticeable residue. •Infused with Italian bergamot essential oil, emitting a fresh and neutral citrus fragrance, bringing a pleasant sensory experience." " Ingredients: •Vitamin B5: Helps with skin hydration and barrier function maintenance. •Shea Butter: Rich in fatty acids, helps relieve dryness, making the skin softer and more elastic. •Oat Extract: Soothes the skin, providing a comforting sensation.  How to use: After bathing, take an appropriate amount of the product and apply it evenly to the entire body skin. Gently massage, and for dry areas such as knees and elbows, you can reapply as needed.
detail_html:
MALIN+GOETZ Vitamin B5 Body Moisturizer(220ml)
A daily nourishing body lotion with a lightweight formula designed to provide skin with balanced hydration, suitable for regular care, absorbs quickly, and helps the skin maintain all-day hydration and comfort.

Product Features:
•Deep moisturizing without greasiness, multiple moisturizing and nourishing ingredients work together to provide the skin with continuous hydration experience.
•Lightweight lotion texture, quickly absorbed after application, without any noticeable residue.
•Infused with Italian bergamot essential oil, emitting a fresh and neutral citrus fragrance, bringing a pleasant sensory experience." "

Ingredients:
•Vitamin B5: Helps with skin hydration and barrier function maintenance.
•Shea Butter: Rich in fatty acids, helps relieve dryness, making the skin softer and more elastic.
•Oat Extract: Soothes the skin, providing a comforting sensation. 

How to use:
After bathing, take an appropriate amount of the product and apply it evenly to the entire body skin. Gently massage, and for dry areas such as knees and elbows, you can reapply as needed.

detail_html:
Description

Extreme Dry Skin Repair Lotion with 10% Urea repairs your skin depleted lipids, relieving dryness with ultimate hydration. Formulated with 10% concentration of Urea provides rapid relief to extreme dry skin conditions and irritations of skin. This repairing lotion also contains Lecithin, Sweet Almond oil and Triglycerides to help in restoring lipid balance and prevent further moisture loss of the skin.

Benefits

- Soothes irritation and inflammation

- Humectant capacity to prevent excessive moisture loss

- Sweet almond oil helps in soften and smoothen dry and damaged skin

- Lecithin restores natural oil content within skin, improves skin resistance to damage

- 10% of Urea rapidly moistures skin and encourages the dead and dry skin to peel away naturally

- Suitable for eczema, psoriasis, itchyosis, xerosis, diabetic patients, extreme dry skin

How to Use

Gently massage a small amount of lotion into effected area after bathing with a non-soap cleanser to seal in moisture, or anytime to help ease dryness

product.desc:
Description

Extreme Dry Skin Repair Lotion with 10% Urea repairs your skin depleted lipids, relieving dryness with ultimate hydration. Formulated with 10% concentration of Urea provides rapid relief to extreme dry skin conditions and irritations of skin. This repairing lotion also contains Lecithin, Sweet Almond oil and Triglycerides to help in restoring lipid balance and prevent further moisture loss of the skin.

Benefits

- Soothes irritation and inflammation

- Humectant capacity to prevent excessive moisture loss

- Sweet almond oil helps in soften and smoothen dry and damaged skin

- Lecithin restores natural oil content within skin, improves skin resistance to damage

- 10% of Urea rapidly moistures skin and encourages the dead and dry skin to peel away naturally

- Suitable for eczema, psoriasis, itchyosis, xerosis, diabetic patients, extreme dry skin

How to Use

Gently massage a small amount of lotion into effected area after bathing with a non-soap cleanser to seal in moisture, or anytime to help ease dryness
